<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

1:
Methuli Cattlan has asked you craft for her three high-quality gyrodrive components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. Unfortunately, the materials required in their synthesis have been stolen in transit by the Ixal who dwell in the logging grounds. Make your way to Alder Springs, and retrieve the materials from the storage pot in which they are kept.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

3:
Hildeyerd has prepared the crafting facility for your use. With the materials you have obtained, synthesize three high-quality gyrodrive components, and deliver them to Methuli Cattlan at Ehcatl.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Detailing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Hildeyerd.
